Public Relations and Advertising

Relations with Business World

MENU

SEARCH

Branded Courses

In today’s business environment, the contemporary understanding of
competition has brought integrated marketing communication—one of the new
dimensions of marketing—to the forefront. This approach emphasizes the necessity
of positioning the right person at the right place and time, equipped with
appropriate communication and marketing skills. Accordingly, sectoral
expectations have made it essential for qualified human resources in the field
of public relations and advertising to possess both strong theoretical
knowledge and practical expertise.

Istanbul Okan University

aims to
prepare its students as distinguished and competitive individuals in the
business world by enriching its educational approach with both structural
frameworks and practical applications, ensuring that their career
journeys—beginning upon graduation—are successfully sustained.

One reflection of this approach is the involvement of business leaders and
leading industry representatives in courses during the education period, where
they share their professional experience with students through hands-on
practices. In line with this vision, our department has established
collaborations with industry professionals and, starting from the 2025–2026
academic year, has implemented the “Branded Courses” model, in which courses
are co-developed and delivered with professionals. Within this framework,
courses such as

Brand and Story Design

in collaboration with

Brand Story Agency

,

Research Methods in
Communication

with

MAXQDA

,

Writing
Techniques in Public Relations

with

Essance
Istanbul

, and

Product Placement and Brand Integration

with

3P Agency

are offered.

From the perspective of companies, this approach provides the opportunity to
engage with our students during their development phase through internships and
practice-based courses conducted within our department. In this way,
distinguished companies in our country gain the advantage of identifying and
evaluating talented young individuals who will shape their future, enabling
them to make informed recruitment decisions.

Professional Engagements

The Department of Public Relations and Advertising embraces building strong
connections with the industry as a core component of its educational approach,
in line with

Istanbul Okan University

’s
vision of being “The University Closest to the Business World.”

Within this framework, numerous events are organized either directly by our
department or in collaboration with various academic and administrative units
of the university. Through talks, panels, workshops, and hands-on activities
featuring industry professionals, our students gain the opportunity to directly
engage with and discuss current dynamics in fields such as digital
communication, brand management, media, journalism, advertising, corporate
communication, data analytics, and cultural communication.

Executives from companies, agencies, and media organizations, as well as
leading scholars in the field of communication, regularly come together with
our students through these events. As a result, students develop a close
understanding of different sectors within the communication industry, establish
direct interaction with professionals, and begin to build their professional
networks during their undergraduate education.
